subject: Attachment types test — all 5 types
body:
This message tests all five attachment types. Click each chip:

- 🔗 **url** → opens in browser
- 📄 **file (.md)** → opens in the built-in markdown viewer
- 🖼 **image** → opens lightweight image viewer window
- ✅ **task-ref** → shows tooltip with task ID
- 📝 **text** → pops up inline content

Let me know if any chip behaves unexpectedly.

attachments.label: Sample note
attachments.content:
# Hello from the inbox

This is a **text** attachment rendered in a dialog.
